title: Crisp Resinous Croatian Onion Wrap
description: A simple yet flavorful solo dinner dish from Croatia, featuring a crisp yellow onion filling, steamed in a leaf wrap, perfect for Shojin-friendly diets.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add the olive oil.
Add the sliced onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned.
Stir in the dill sprigs and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Arrange a leaf wrap on a flat surface and place a portion of the onion mixture in the center.
Add a few lavender leaves on top of the onion, if using.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a neat package.
Steam the wraps in a steamer basket over boiling water for 5-7 minutes, or until the wraps are pliable and the filling is heated through.
